goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review intake builder for cockpit patch permit issuance request packets while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit patch permit issuance request packets can be accepted for authority review without issuing a permit.
Authority review, reviewer, and intake evidence refs are required.
assumptions: Actual authority decision and permit issuance require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority ref, and blocked request packet cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-095 converted cockpit patch permit issuance readiness into a request packet without issuing a permit.
